abilities.reignofnether.call_lightning.t: Summon a bolt of lightning at the target location.
Can be used to charge creepers and damage enemies.
Charged creepers gain a temporary speed buff
abilities.reignofnether.summon_vexes.too: After a long delay, summon %d flying vexes that attack
the evoker's target. Vexes start to die off after %d seconds.
abilities.reignofnether.connect_portal.t: Connect to a transport portal you own anywhere else.
Overrides any existing connections on both sides.
abilities.reignofnether.connect_portal.e: Must target another completed transport portal you own.
abilities.reignofnether.fire_wall_shot.t: Fire an accurate shot that ignites all blocks in a line.
While this is on cooldown, the blaze cannot attack.
That unit is already a captain!
Only Vindicators, Pillagers, Evokers and Militia may be promoted
Promote a unit to a captain, giving it a banner that gives a
speed buff to units (except ravagers) in a %d block radius.
You may only have one captain at a time per upgraded castle.
abilities.reignofnether.roar.tooltip2: Emit a deafening roar, knocking away, damaging
abilities.reignofnether.roar.tooltip3: and briefly slowing down all nearby enemies.
abilities.reignofnether.evoker_fangs_cir: Have this evoker summon a circle of snapping
abilities.reignofnether.evoker_fangs_lin: Have this evoker summon a long line of snapping
fangs away from itself when attacking.
abilities.reignofnether.sonic_boom.error: Must target a unit or building.
abilities.reignofnether.sonic_boom.toolt: After a short delay, fire a targeted wave of sound at
the target, dealing heavy magic damage and knockback.
abilities.reignofnether.water_potion.too: Throw a potion that douses all fires.
abilities.reignofnether.healing_potion.t: Throw a potion that heals living units and damages undead
abilities.reignofnether.lingering_harmin: Throw a potion that leaves a cloud of deadly gas.
abilities.reignofnether.lingering_regen_: Throw a potion that leaves a cloud of healing vapours.
abilities.reignofnether.shield_stance.to: Raise or lower a shield - reducing projectile
damage taken by 75%%, movement speed by 50%%
abilities.reignofnether.sacrifice.toolti: Kill a nearby friendly unit to spread sculk.
Target a unit to auto-sacrifice that unit type
abilities.reignofnether.sacrifice.only_o: Can only sacrifice your own units
abilities.reignofnether.sacrifice.in_air: Can't sacrifice units in the air
abilities.reignofnether.sacrifice.not_sp: Unit is not on a spreadable block
abilities.reignofnether.spin_webs.toolti: Throw a bunch of sticky webs onto the
Cannot be used while or recently mounted.
abilities.reignofnether.wither_cloud.too: Causes the Wither Skeleton to release a cloud
of deadly wither around it for the next %d seconds.
abilities.reignofnether.bloodlust.toolti: Temporary lose %d life to gain 60%% faster attack
speed and 20%% faster movement for %d seconds.
abilities.reignofnether.call_to_arms_bui: Calls all nearby villagers to be converted into a
militia to defend your base. Militia turn back into
villagers when more than %d blocks from a Town Centre.
abilities.reignofnether.call_to_arms_uni: Run to the nearest Town Centre to be converted into a
militia to defend your base. Militia turn back into
villagers when more than %d blocks from a Town Centre.
abilities.reignofnether.back_to_work_bui: Converts all nearby militia back into villagers
and have them go back to their last work position.
abilities.reignofnether.back_to_work_uni: Convert this Militia back into a Villager
and go back to its last work position.
Switch to a bow, gaining a ranged attack,
but losing attack, move speed and armor.
abilities.reignofnether.weapon_swap_swor: Switch to a sword, losing the ranged attack,
but gaining attack, move speed and armor.
abilities.reignofnether.consume.tooltip1: Kill a friendly magma cube or slime to grow this one.
abilities.reignofnether.consume.tooltip2: Adds half of its max health and damage to this one.
abilities.reignofnether.consume.error2: Can only target Magma Cubes or Slimes you own
abilities.reignofnether.consume.error3: Can only eat equal or smaller Cubes or Slimes
abilities.reignofnether.raise_dead.toolt: Summons a pair of temporary elite Zombies.
Each rank of Soul Siphon adds Thorns to an armour piece.
abilities.reignofnether.insomnia_curse.t: Curses a unit or building to be hunted by a
phantom with %d dmg + %d per Soul Siphon rank.
abilities.reignofnether.soul_siphon.tool: Collect souls of the dead to heal or empower spells
Larger enemies are worth more souls.
(Right-click to consume up to %d souls for %d health per soul)
abilities.reignofnether.soul_siphon.rank: Rank 1: spells use 4/20 souls for a minor boost
Rank 2: spells use 7/30 souls for a moderate boost
Rank 3: spells use 10/40 souls for a major boost
abilities.reignofnether.blood_moon.toolt: Distorts day into night under a blood red moon,
causing neutral undead to periodically spawn
inside the targeted enemy base while active.
abilities.reignofnether.blood_moon.alrea: A blood moon is already active
abilities.reignofnether.chilling_screech: Unleash a bone-chilling scream that creates a wave of snow
and causes nearby units to take damage while on snow for %ds.
abilities.reignofnether.frostblink.toolt: Phase through the ground and reappear a short distance
away, creating a layer of chilling snow along the way
abilities.reignofnether.bitter_frost.too: Create extra snow from various actions. Each layer
reduces attack, move speed and armor by 10%% (max 80%%)
abilities.reignofnether.bitter_frost.ran: Rank 1: Basic attacks create an area of snow
Rank 2: Attackers have snow placed under them
Rank 3: Snow cannot melt near the wraith
abilities.reignofnether.blizzard.tooltip: Channel for up to %ds, causing random nearby enemies to be frozen in a block
of ice and take heavy damage. While channeling, the wraith takes less damage
and can't be moved or stunned, but any other actions will end the blizzard.
abilities.reignofnether.throw_tnt.toolti: Hurls a block of TNT that explodes after a delay.
-%ds cooldown & %d mana refund per 100 wood spent.
abilities.reignofnether.fancy_feast.tool: Throws out a pile of food that units eat to heal.
Throws %d items + %d & %d mana refund per 100 food spent.
abilities.reignofnether.fancy_feast.rank: Rank 1: Throws bread for +%d hp per item
Rank 2: Throws chicken for +%d hp per item
Rank 3: Throws beef for +%d hp per item
abilities.reignofnether.greed_is_good.to: Other spells spend resources to be empowered and refund mana
Spends up to %d resources per spell cast.
abilities.reignofnether.greed_is_good.ra: Rank 1: Spells spend up to 100 resources
Rank 2: Spells spend up to 200 resources
Rank 3: Spells spend up to 300 resources
abilities.reignofnether.loot_explosion.t: Share a hoard of powerful items that
friendly piglins units can use in battle.
Throws %d items + %d items & %d mana refund per 100 ore spent.
abilities.reignofnether.molten_bomb.tool: Shoot a large fireball that explodes when it reaches its
target, igniting the area and creating temporary magma.
abilities.reignofnether.scorching_gaze.t: Focus a burning hatred for a single enemy, engulfing it in flames
that triples fire tick damage and leaves a trail of magma.
Units that die under this effect pass it to another nearby friendly unit.
abilities.reignofnether.intense_heat.too: Enemies within %d blocks tick their fire damage
faster the closer they are to the wildfire.
abilities.reignofnether.intense_heat.ran: Rank 1: Fire ticks up to %dx faster
Rank 2: Fire ticks up to %dx faster
Rank 3: Fire ticks up to %dx faster
abilities.reignofnether.souls_aflame.too: Kindle the souls of all nearby flames and friendly blazes,
infusing them with soulfire for %ds. Soulfire burns for 2x
damage, cannot be extinguished and ignores fire resistance.
abilities.reignofnether.mace_slam.toolti: Slam the ground in front of the guard,
damaging and stunning enemy units for %ds.
abilities.reignofnether.taunting_cry.too: Let out a mocking cry that forces nearby enemy units to
lose control and force them to attack the guard for %ds.
While active, the Guard has knockback immunity, resistance and slowness.
abilities.reignofnether.battle_rage.tool: Gain up to +%d health regen as the Guard nears death
Gain %d mana per damage taken from an enemy.
abilities.reignofnether.battle_rage.rank: Rank 1: Up to +1.2hp/s regen, +0.4 mana per dmg taken
Rank 2: Up to +1.8hp/s regen, +0.6 mana per dmg taken
Rank 3: Up to +2.4hp/s regen, +0.8 mana per dmg taken
abilities.reignofnether.avatar.tooltip1: Grow in size and strength, becoming an embodient of war itself.
abilities.reignofnether.avatar.tooltip2: Grants +%d max health, faster movement, an explosive splash
abilities.reignofnether.civil_enchantmen: Enchants a villager's tools with efficiency temporarily,
improving build speeds and gather rates by 50%% for %ds
abilities.reignofnether.martial_enchantm: Enchants a unit's weapon with a combat enchantment based
on the weapon type. This stacks with library enchantments.
abilities.reignofnether.protective_encha: Enchants a unit's chestplate with Fortifying,
granting absorption health over time, to a max of %d.
abilities.reignofnether.march_of_progres: March of Progress is already active
Toggle an aura that doubles the effect of all enchantments.
The aura drains %d mana per second while active.
abilities.reignofnether.can_be_toggled: Can be toggled on or off
ability.reignofnether.enchant.error1: Can only enchant your own units
ability.reignofnether.enchant.error6: Unit is not wearing any armour to enchant
ability.reignofnether.enchant.error7: Unit is not holding any weapons to enchant
ability.reignofnether.enchant.maiming.to: Enchant a Vindicator's axe with Maiming
causing targets to be slowed on hit.
Enchant a Pillager's crossbow with Quick Charge II,
reducing the time it takes to load arrows by 0.5s.
Enchant a Vindicator's axe with Sharpness II,
Enchant a Pillager's crossbow with Multishot,
making it fire 3 arrows at once in a spread.
ability.reignofnether.enchant.vigor.tool: Gives an Evoker a wand enchanted with
ability.reignofnether.equip.error1: Can only forge armor for your own units
ability.reignofnether.equip.error3: Target must be a Villager military unit
ability.reignofnether.equip.error4: Target already has that type of chestplate
ability.reignofnether.equip.leather_ches: Create and equip a leather chestplate on a unit.
ability.reignofnether.equip.chainmail_ch: Create and equip a chainmail chestplate on a unit.
ability.reignofnether.beacon_aura.wealth: Activate an aura to grant you a trickle of free resources.
Activate an aura to increase worker build speed.
ability.reignofnether.beacon_aura.regene: Activate an aura to heal nearby units.
ability.reignofnether.beacon_aura.streng: Activate an aura to increase melee damage.
ability.reignofnether.beacon_aura.resist: Actvate an aura to reduce damage taken by units.
ability.reignofnether.beacon_aura.one_au: Only one aura can be active at a time.
building.reignofnether.outside_map: Outside or too close to map border
building.reignofnether.must_be_nether: Must be built on nether terrain
building.reignofnether.must_be_liquid: Must be placed in water or lava
building.reignofnether.build_centre_here: Build your town centre over here!
buildings.monsters.reignofnether.dark_wa: An ominous tower that can garrison units.
Garrisoned ranged units have increased range.
Can hold a maximum of %d units
buildings.monsters.reignofnether.dungeon: A fiery cage containing the power to create creepers.
buildings.monsters.reignofnether.graveya: A field of the dead that can raise Zombies and Skeletons
buildings.monsters.reignofnether.haunted: A spooky house that provides population supply.
buildings.monsters.reignofnether.laborat: A sinister lab that can research new technologies
based on the other buildings that have been built.
buildings.monsters.reignofnether.mausole: A tomb of the dead that produces zombie villagers.
Distorts time to midnight within a %d block radius,
or a %d block radius for additional mausoleums.
buildings.monsters.reignofnether.pumpkin: A pumpkin field that can be harvested to collect food.
Pumpkins don't need to replanted but farms cost more up front.
buildings.monsters.reignofnether.spider_: A silken cave to grow spiders, both large and poisonous.
buildings.monsters.reignofnether.slime_p: A pool of viscous green goop and algae that grows slimes.
buildings.monsters.reignofnether.spruce_: A bridge built to traverse water.
Must be connected to land or another bridge.
Can be built over lava (but isn't fireproof!)
Bridges can be repaired or attacked by anyone.
Storage for units and players to drop off resources
buildings.monsters.reignofnether.strongh: A villainous stronghold that can produce wardens
Distorts time to midnight within a %d block radius
Requires a Laboratory, Spider Lair and Dungeon.
buildings.monsters.reignofnether.sculk_c: A pillar which spreads sculk when nearby units die.
Distorts time to midnight within a %d block radius.
Nearby sculk extends this range up to %d and
buildings.monsters.reignofnether.altar_o: A font of dark energy to manifest horrors of the dark.
Trains new and revives fallen Monster heroes.
A fortified barracks to house Marauder piglins,
enabling them to be produced at military portals.
buildings.piglins.reignofnether.blacksto: A bridge built to traverse water or lava.
Must be connected to land or another bridge.
Bridges can be repaired or attacked by anyone.
buildings.piglins.reignofnether.central_: The primary portal to transport piglin grunts from the nether.
Only one capitol can produce workers at any given time.
buildings.piglins.reignofnether.flame_sa: Scorching pillars of lava and brick to keep blazes,
enabling their production at military portals.
buildings.piglins.reignofnether.basalt_s: An artificial basalt delta allowing magma cubes to remain warm
in the overworld, enabling their production at military portals
buildings.piglins.reignofnether.fortress: An imposing nether fortress that allows military portals
to produce ghasts and garrisons up to %d units.
Requires a Flame Sanctuary and a Wither Shrine.
buildings.piglins.reignofnether.hoglin_s: A shelter to keep Hoglins stabled in the overworld,
enabling their production at military portals.
buildings.piglins.reignofnether.netherwa: A field of netherwart that can be farmed collect food.
Workers automatically use wood to replant while working.
buildings.piglins.reignofnether.portal_b: An obsidian portal used to spread nether blocks.
Can be upgraded for various different functions.
Can be built on overworld terrain, but at half speed.
buildings.piglins.reignofnether.wither_s: A dark shrine dedicated to the power of Withers.
Enables wither skeletons production at military portals.
buildings.piglins.reignofnether.infernal: A decorated portal reserved for champions of the Nether.
Trains new and revives fallen Piglin heroes.
buildings.villagers.reignofnether.arcane: A magical tower that is home to Witches and Evokers.
buildings.villagers.reignofnether.barrac: A training ground for Pillagers and Vindicators
buildings.villagers.reignofnether.blacks: A smithy to forge military upgrades and iron golems.
buildings.villagers.reignofnether.castle: A grand castle that can produce ravagers
Requires a Blacksmith, Arcane Tower, and a Barracks.
buildings.villagers.reignofnether.iron_g: An Iron Golem that can be built in the field.
Requires research and an active Blacksmith
buildings.villagers.reignofnether.librar: An enchanting table surrounded by pillars of books.
Used to research magic upgrades and enchant weapons.
buildings.villagers.reignofnether.oak_br: A bridge built to traverse water.
Must be connected to land or another bridge.
Can be built over lava (but isn't fireproof!)
Bridges can be repaired or attacked by anyone.
buildings.villagers.reignofnether.oak_st: Storage for units and players to drop off resources
buildings.villagers.reignofnether.town_c: A gazebo at the centre of your village that produces villagers.
Only one capitol can produce workers at any given time.
buildings.villagers.reignofnether.villag: A simple house that provides population supply.
buildings.villagers.reignofnether.watcht: A fortified tower that can garrison units.
Garrisoned ranged units have increased range.
Can hold a maximum of %d units
buildings.villagers.reignofnether.wheat_: A wheat field that be can tilled to collect food.
Workers automatically use wood to replant seeds while working.
buildings.villagers.reignofnether.shrine: A symbol of the alliance of Villagers and Pillagers.
Trains new and revives fallen Villager heroes.
buildings.neutral.reignofnether.capturab: A pyramid that grants a variety of powerful auras.
Controlling it for long enough grants victory.
buildings.neutral.reignofnether.beacon.t: A grand stone pyramid that can be upgraded to produce auras.
Controlling a fully upgraded beacon for long enough grants victory.
Only one beacon can exist at a time
Requires a Castle, Stronghold or Fortress
buildings.neutral.reignofnether.beacon.c: %s has gained control of the Beacon!
buildings.neutral.reignofnether.end_port: A mysterious portal that can produce

commands.reignofnether.gamerule.lock_all: Disallow changing allies during a match
commands.reignofnether.gamerule.allowed_: How many heroes players can train

full speed and enables the transport portal upgrade.

research.reignofnether.blaze_firewall.to: Allows Blazes to fire a single shot that ignites all
blocks in a line, but disables their attacks temporarily.
research.reignofnether.brute_shields.too: Allows Brutes to raise a shield to reduce projectile
damage taken by 75%%, movement speed by 50%% and
research.reignofnether.castle_flag.toolt: Upgrades this castle to be able to promote an illager unit
to a captain that provides a speed aura to friendly units.
Each upgraded castle may only support one captain at a time.
Transforms all of your zombies into drowned, which
zombify Villager and Piglin units after killing them.
research.reignofnether.evoker_vexes.tool: Unlocks the ability for evokers to summon vexes.
research.reignofnether.fire_resistance.t: Wither Skeletons become immune to regular fire damage.
Does not protect against soulfire or lava.
research.reignofnether.golem_smithing.to: Allows villagers to construct iron golems.
research.reignofnether.heavy_tridents.to: Headhunters' tridents knock enemies back on hit.
research.reignofnether.cleaving_flails.t: Marauders' flail attacks also hit two random enemies
next to the main target for reduced damage and effect.
research.reignofnether.hoglin_cavalry.to: Unlocks the ability for headhunters to mount hoglins.
research.reignofnether.research_husks.to: Transforms all of your zombies into husks,
research.reignofnether.lightning_rod.too: Adds a lightning rod to this lab that can be activated
to call lightning to charge creepers and damage enemies.
Causes enemies killed by slimes to become slimes.
Larger enemies turn into larger slimes.
Does not work for tiny slimes.
research.reignofnether.lingering_potions: Doubles the duration of witches' potion clouds.
research.reignofnether.healing_potions.t: Allows Witches to throw healing potions that also harm undead.
research.reignofnether.water_potions.too: Allows Witches to throw water potions to douse fires.
research.reignofnether.pillager_crossbow: Enchants the crossbows of all pillagers with multishot
research.reignofnether.research_poison_s: Transforms your Spiders into Poison Spiders,

and allowing workers to drop resources off here.
research.reignofnether.military_portal.t: Convert into a military portal, allowing production
of military units based on the buildings you own.
Convert into a transport portal, allowing for instant

gaining explosive arrows that shoot upwards like mortar.

Workers now auto-return resources when holding above 100
research.reignofnether.research_silverfi: Gives your buildings a %s chance to spawn
a silverfish whenever a block is destroyed.
research.reignofnether.spider_jockeys.to: Unlocks the ability for skeletons to mount spiders.
research.reignofnether.research_strays.t: Transforms all of your skeletons into
research.reignofnether.research_bogged.t: Unlocks Bogged skeletons at the Graveyard

research.reignofnether.militia_bows.tool: Allows Militia to swap to a ranged bow attack in
exchange for lower attack, move speed and armor.
research.reignofnether.wither_clouds.too: Unlocks the ability for Wither Skeletons to produce
clouds of wither around them for a few seconds.
research.reignofnether.bloodlust.tooltip: Unlocks the ability for Piglins and Hoglins to lose
life temporarily for a boost to attack and move speed.
research.reignofnether.cube_magma.toolti: Upgrades Magma Cubes to create temporary
magma blocks around wherever they jump.
research.reignofnether.soul_fireballs.to: Infuses Ghast fireballs with soulfire, causing them
to create temporary soulsand and soulfire on impact.

webs onto the field to trap enemies.
Cannot be used by mounted spiders.
Wardens can Sonic Boom Sculk Catalysts to split the boom
onto %d random enemies in %d range with reduced damage.
research.reignofnether.grand_library.too: Upgrades this library, unlocking more powerful enchantments.

tutorial.reignofnether.join: Press F12 to toggle RTS camera and join the game
tutorial.reignofnether.help: Use '/rts-help' to see the list of all commands
tutorial.reignofnether.controls: Use '/rts-controls' to see the list of controls
tutorial.reignofnether.locked: This RTS match has been locked. Please wait for a new game before joining.
tutorial.reignofnether.welcome_back: Welcome back to Reign of Nether
tutorial.reignofnether.op_commands: As a server op you may use:
tutorial.reignofnether.sync_disabled1: RTS Syncing has been disabled, so you cannot select buildings or see unit owners, sorry!
tutorial.reignofnether.sync_disabled2: To resolve this, please ask the host to re-enable it, then relog.
tutorial.reignofnether.server_not_found: Failed to load tutorial, server couldn't be found.
tutorial.reignofnether.skipping: Skipping tutorial stage... you are now on: %s
tutorial.reignofnether.ready_continue: Press SPACE when you're ready to continue.
tutorial.reignofnether.rts_view: Welcome to RTS view. Instead of the usual first-person minecraft camera, here we can view the world from a top-down perspective.
tutorial.reignofnether.see_again: TIP: If you want to see any of these messages again, open chat with ENTER or the button on the right.
tutorial.reignofnether.reminder: If at any point you're lost or need a reminder on what to do next, click the button at the top right. Try doing that now to continue.
tutorial.reignofnether.need_click: You needed to click this button, which you just did. Great work!
tutorial.reignofnether.move_camera: To move your camera, move your mouse to the edges of the screen. Try it now.
tutorial.reignofnether.move_camera2: Move your mouse to each edge of your screen until the camera starts moving, as shown by the arrows.
tutorial.reignofnether.tip.arrow_keys: TIP: You can also move the camera with arrow keys.
tutorial.reignofnether.tip.zoom: TIP: You can zoom the camera with ALT+SCROLL and rotate it with ALT+RIGHT-CLICK.
tutorial.reignofnether.minimap: Since you could get lost with a top-down view like this, here's a minimap for you to help navigate.
tutorial.reignofnether.map_click: You can move around the world quickly by clicking on a spot on the map. Try doing that now.
tutorial.reignofnether.map_click2: Click a spot on the minimap at the bottom right to move the camera there
tutorial.reignofnether.recenter: If you need to move really far away, you can also SHIFT+CLICK to recentre the map on that location.
tutorial.reignofnether.tip.expand_map: TIP: Press M or click the bottom right button to expand the map. The very dark areas are outside the world border.
tutorial.reignofnether.playing_units: It's time to start playing with some units.
tutorial.reignofnether.spawn_villagers: Let's get started by spawning in some villagers here.
tutorial.reignofnether.spawn_villagers2: Click the button at the top right and then click on the ground where you want to place your villagers.
tutorial.reignofnether.worker_units: Villagers are your worker units who can build and gather resources and are essential to starting and maintaining a good base.
tutorial.reignofnether.select_worker2: LEFT-CLICK a villager to select it.
tutorial.reignofnether.move_worker: Now, RIGHT-CLICK where you want to move it.
tutorial.reignofnether.move_worker2: LEFT-CLICK a villager to select it, then RIGHT-CLICK on the ground to move it.
tutorial.reignofnether.select_villagers: Now let's try selecting a group of villagers.
tutorial.reignofnether.select_villagers2: To do this, hold LEFT-CLICK and DRAG your mouse across them, then release to select.
tutorial.reignofnether.select_villagers3: Hold LEFT-CLICK and DRAG your mouse across a group of villagers, then release to select them.
tutorial.reignofnether.move_group: Now, RIGHT-CLICK where you want to move the group.
tutorial.reignofnether.move_group2: With a group of villagers selected, RIGHT-CLICK on the ground to move them.
tutorial.reignofnether.tip.select_same: TIP: You can also double click a unit to select all units of the same type.
tutorial.reignofnether.tip.deselect: TIP: If you want to deselect your units, press the tilde (~) key
tutorial.reignofnether.tip.grouping: TIP: For you RTS fans, control grouping with CTRL+NUM is also a feature.
tutorial.reignofnether.start_base: It's time to start your base.
tutorial.reignofnether.capitol: The first and most important building of any base is always the capitol.
tutorial.reignofnether.good_spot: This looks like a good spot for it, being flat ground, near lots of resources and with plenty of space around it for other buildings.
tutorial.reignofnether.building_resource: Note that building takes resources. Luckily, the TOP-LEFT shows we have more than enough WOOD and ORE needed.
tutorial.reignofnether.place_capitol: Select your workers, then click the bottom-left button and click on the ground where you want to place your capitol.
tutorial.reignofnether.place_capitol2: Select your workers, then click the bottom-left button and click on the ground to place a town centre.
tutorial.reignofnether.all_workers_build: If they aren't already, you can have all of your villagers help to build to speed up progress. To do this, select your workers and RIGHT-CLICK the building.
tutorial.reignofnether.wait_for_capitol: Just wait for your Town Centre to complete. If your workers stopped building for some reason, just select them and RIGHT-CLICK it to resume.
tutorial.reignofnether.select_building: You can also select the building itself like a unit to see how far along it is in building.
tutorial.reignofnether.congratulations: Congratulations, you now have a base set up!
tutorial.reignofnether.capitols_produce_: Capitols like the Town Centre are the only building that can produce workers like villagers.
tutorial.reignofnether.worker_cost: Note that producing workers takes 50 FOOD each. We should have enough resources for quite a lot
tutorial.reignofnether.rally_point: LEFT-CLICK to select your Town Centre, RIGHT-CLICK to set a rally point - units will automatically go to that spot when they appear.
tutorial.reignofnether.rally_point2: LEFT-CLICK to select your Town Centre, then RIGHT-CLICK on the ground to set a rally point.
tutorial.reignofnether.make_villager: Now let's try making a villager. With your Town Centre selected, click the bottom-left button to start producing one.
tutorial.reignofnether.make_villager2: LEFT-CLICK to select your Town Centre, click the bottom-left button make a villager, then wait for it to be completed.
tutorial.reignofnether.tip.queue: TIP: you can queue up as many units to build as you can afford.
tutorial.reignofnether.nice_work_workers: Nice work. Workers are vital for a healthy base!
tutorial.reignofnether.tip.cancel: TIP: you can cancel any in-progress units for a full refund by clicking their icon at the bottom.
tutorial.reignofnether.gather_resources: Now that we have a bunch of workers, we can start gathering some resources.
tutorial.reignofnether.forest: There's a forest over here that we can get wood from.
tutorial.reignofnether.gather_wood: To gather a resource, select a worker, then RIGHT-CLICK a tree.
tutorial.reignofnether.gather_wood2: Select any villager, then RIGHT-CLICK any tree.
tutorial.reignofnether.tip.autoreturn: TIP: Workers keep gathering until told to do something else. Once they have at least 50 total resources they return it to the town centre.
tutorial.reignofnether.gather_ore: Now let's do the same thing for ore.
tutorial.reignofnether.beach_ore: Here's a beach with coal and copper we can get ore from.
tutorial.reignofnether.click_ore: Select a worker, then RIGHT-CLICK an ore block.
tutorial.reignofnether.click_ore2: Select any villager, then RIGHT-CLICK any ore block.
tutorial.reignofnether.tip.sand_richer: TIP: Sandy biomes like deserts and beaches have more and better ores.
tutorial.reignofnether.gather_food: While your other workers are busy on wood and ore, let's find some food.
tutorial.reignofnether.pigs: Here are some pigs that you can hunt for food.
tutorial.reignofnether.hunt_pig: Just like wood and ore, select a worker and RIGHT-CLICK an animal to start hunting it.
tutorial.reignofnether.hunt_pig2: Select any villager, then RIGHT-CLICK an animal and wait for it to be killed. Make sure that villager doesn't already have a full inventory.
tutorial.reignofnether.empty_pockets: Make sure your worker isn't holding any other resources!
tutorial.reignofnether.tip.dropped: TIP: If your worker can't hold all the food after hunting an animal, it will drop to the ground.
tutorial.reignofnether.tip.pick_up: TIP: Dropped items like food and saplings can be picked by ANY unit and returned for resources.
tutorial.reignofnether.return_food: Your villager should now return the food to your town centre, but if they aren't, simply select the villager and RIGHT-CLICK your Town Centre.
tutorial.reignofnether.return_food2: Select your villager that hunted the pig and RIGHT-CLICK your Town Centre.
tutorial.reignofnether.tip.max_carry: TIP: Units hold up to 100 total resources, but hunting allows you to go above this maximum.
tutorial.reignofnether.expand_base: Let's expand your base. Some new buildings have been unlocked for you. Select a worker if you haven't already to check them out.
tutorial.reignofnether.new_buildings: Select any worker to check out your new building options.
tutorial.reignofnether.stockpiles: Stockpiles can give your workers a place to drop off resources faster.
tutorial.reignofnether.houses: Houses raise your max unit population. Check the top left for your current totals.
tutorial.reignofnether.farms: Farms give you a slow but renewable source of food in exchange for wood.
tutorial.reignofnether.barracks: Finally, a barracks lets you start training soldiers to fight enemies.
tutorial.reignofnether.check_out_buildin: Let's take some time to check out a few of these buildings.
tutorial.reignofnether.build_barracks: When you're ready, build a barracks and get prepare to train your first army.
tutorial.reignofnether.build_barracks2: Select any villager and build a barracks building at the bottom left. Make sure you've gathered enough wood to afford it!
tutorial.reignofnether.select_barracks: The barracks is one of many buildings that can produce military units. Select your barracks to check them out.
tutorial.reignofnether.select_barracks2: Select your barracks to check out your military unit options
tutorial.reignofnether.vindicators: Vindicators are melee units with high health and moderate damage.
tutorial.reignofnether.pillagers: Pillagers are ranged units which attack slowly but with high damage.
tutorial.reignofnether.produce_illagers: Select your barracks and produce a total of 3 Pillagers and/or Vindicators. If you need more food try building a farm or hunt more animals. If you need more population supply, try building a house.
tutorial.reignofnether.three_units: Try building 3 units from here to continue.
tutorial.reignofnether.tip.select_milita: TIP: If you lose track of your military units, you can press K or click the button on the right to select all of them at once.
tutorial.reignofnether.monster_attack: Uh oh, looks like some monsters are about to attack!
tutorial.reignofnether.attack: With your units selected, RIGHT-CLICK an enemy to attack them. Units will also automatically attack nearby enemies if they are idle.
tutorial.reignofnether.defended: Nicely done, you successfully defended your base!
tutorial.reignofnether.tip.death_drops: TIP: During an attack, be sure to protect your workers. If a worker dies while holding resources, it is dropped and can be stolen by your enemies!
tutorial.reignofnether.buildings_damaged: Looks like some of your buildings were damaged in the attack.
tutorial.reignofnether.repair_buildings: Try repairing one of them by selecting a villager, then RIGHT-CLICKING the damaged building. Repairs cost 1 wood for each block.
tutorial.reignofnether.repair_buildings2: Select a worker and RIGHT-CLICK a damaged building, then wait for it to be fully repaired. Repairs cost 1 wood for each block.
tutorial.reignofnether.tip.building_heal: TIP: Building health is determined by how many blocks it's made up of. If they have less than half blocks remaining, they are destroyed completely.
tutorial.reignofnether.monster_base: The monsters have a base across the river (but you can't see it yet because fog of war is enabled). We should destroy it before they attack again.
tutorial.reignofnether.monster_base2: The monsters have a base across the river, we should destroy it before they attack again.
tutorial.reignofnether.build_bridge: To cross the river, we need to build a bridge.
tutorial.reignofnether.build_bridge2: This looks like a good spot for one. Select a worker and build a bridge here. You can scroll to rotate the bridge before placement.
tutorial.reignofnether.build_bridge3: Select a worker and build a bridge across the river. You can scroll to rotate the bridge. before placement. If the bridge is too short, you can build more segments connecting to it.
tutorial.reignofnether.tip.bridge_segmen: TIP: You may need more than one bridge segment to cross the river. After completing one you can connect new segments to it.
tutorial.reignofnether.tip.bridges_neutr: TIP: Bridges are always neutral regardless of who built them. This means anyone can attack, repair and connect new segments to them.
tutorial.reignofnether.tip.crossing_brid: TIP: Be very careful when crossing bridges. If it is destroyed while your units are crossing, they will land in the water and be defenceless!
tutorial.reignofnether.reinforcements: Reinforcements have arrived! Use them to crush the enemy base!
tutorial.reignofnether.iron_golem: Your army includes an iron golem and your workers can now build blacksmiths to produce more if needed.
tutorial.reignofnether.destroy_monster_b: Prepare your army and destroy all buildings in the monsters' base
tutorial.reignofnether.tip.ranged_no_bui: TIP: Most ranged units can't attack buildings. Order them to attack units instead!
tutorial.reignofnether.tip.monster_capit: TIP: The monsters' capitol, the Mausoleum, produces an artificial night time around it. If you can destroy it during the day, undead units will burn under the sun.
tutorial.reignofnether.congratulations_t: Congratulations! You have completed the tutorial!
tutorial.reignofnether.continue: You may now continue with all of the buildings and units unlocked.
tutorial.reignofnether.reset_game: To reset the game and try a new faction, type /rts-reset
tutorial.reignofnether.server_hosting: If you would like to play against another player, check out the Reign of Nether CurseForge page for a guide on server hosting.
tutorial.reignofnether.good_luck: Until next time... Good luck and have fun!
units.monsters.reignofnether.creeper.too: An explosive monster that can blow up units and buildings.
Deals less damage to capitol buildings.
Creepers move much more slowly under sunlight.
units.monsters.reignofnether.drowned.too: An infectious variant of the zombie which zombifies
villagers and piglins after killing them.
Requires an upgrade at the Laboratory.
units.monsters.reignofnether.husk.toolti: A hardy variant of the zombie that is immune
Requires an upgrade at the Laboratory.
units.monsters.reignofnether.poison_spid: A spider fanged with deadly poison.
Spiders move much more slowly under sunlight.
Requires an upgrade at the Laboratory.
units.monsters.reignofnether.skeleton.to: An undead soldier with a bow and arrows.
units.monsters.reignofnether.spider.tool: A giant spider that is nimble but frail.
Can be upgraded to allow skeletons to ride them.
Spiders move much more slowly under sunlight.
units.monsters.reignofnether.stray.toolt: A chilling variant of the skeleton that fires slowing arrows.
Requires an upgrade at the Laboratory.
units.monsters.reignofnether.bogged.tool: A toxic variant of the skeleton that fires poison arrows
and will prioritise attacking unpoisoned enemies.
Requires an upgrade at the Laboratory.
units.monsters.reignofnether.slime.toolt: A sentient cube of green slime which can consume
other cubes to grow in size, health and damage.
units.monsters.reignofnether.warden.tool: A powerful but blind monster that can fire sonic booms.
units.monsters.reignofnether.zombie.tool: An undead monster with a basic melee attack.
units.monsters.reignofnether.zombie_vill: An undead worker that can construct and
Zombie villagers are slowed under sunlight.
units.monsters.reignofnether.necromancer: A dark mage adept in summoning other monsters and
manipulating the night using the souls of the dead.
The Necromancer will be slowed under sunlight.
units.monsters.reignofnether.wretched_wr: A chilling spectre capable of summoning storms
and blankets of snow to freeze all living things.
The Wraith will be slowed under sunlight.
units.piglins.reignofnether.blaze.toolti: A fiery elemental that shoots fireballs from afar.
Attacks are fast and ignite enemies but inaccurate.
units.piglins.reignofnether.brute.toolti: A piglin armed with a sword for combat.
units.piglins.reignofnether.ghast.toolti: A massive flying creature that fires explosive fireballs
from a great distance to siege units and buildings.
Slow and fragile, but can only be targeted by ranged units.
units.piglins.reignofnether.grunt.toolti: A piglin worker that can construct and
A piglin that throws tridents in battle.
units.piglins.reignofnether.marauder.too: A burly piglin that slams enemies with a flail arm.
Every 3rd attack stuns and knocks away its target.
units.piglins.reignofnether.hoglin.toolt: A beast trained for war. Deals 50%% more damage to buildings.
Can be upgraded to be mountable by Headhunters.
units.piglins.reignofnether.wither_skele: A charcoal black skeleton that afflicts
units.piglins.reignofnether.magma_cube.t: A sentient molten cube of magma which can consume
other cubes to grow in size, health and damage.
units.piglins.reignofnether.piglin_merch: A jolly piglin trader with endless supplies of food,
loot and explosives, as long as you have the money.
units.piglins.reignofnether.wildfire.too: A greater blaze of untamed flames with the power to
stoke the fire in the souls of enemies and allies alike.
units.villagers.reignofnether.evoker.too: A learned wizard that can cast combat spells.
units.villagers.reignofnether.iron_golem: A slow hulking golem of metal with a powerful melee.
attack that deals double damage to buildings.
units.villagers.reignofnether.pillager.t: A villager armed with a crossbow for ranged combat.
Upgraded with multishot crossbows that fire triple arrows
units.villagers.reignofnether.ravager.to: An enormous beast that can smash through hordes of enemies.
They can roar to knockback enemies and be mounted by pillagers.
units.villagers.reignofnether.villager.t: A worker that can construct and repair buildings and
gather resources. Villagers naturally learn and improve
units.villagers.reignofnether.vindicator: A villager armed with an axe for melee combat.
Upgraded with diamond axes that deal +2 damage
units.villagers.reignofnether.witch.tool: A devious hag who can heal and harm with potions.
units.villagers.reignofnether.royal_guar: A heavily armoured illager ready for war, smashing
through front lines and empowering themselves in battle.
A wise illager dedicated to the art of enchanting, able
to enhance the abilities of both workers and soldiers.
units.neutral.reignofnether.enderman.too: An enigmatic creature from the end. Can teleport
at will and automatically dodges all projectiles.
units.reignofnether.hero_production.allo: You may only have one hero per game
You may have two different heroes per game
units.reignofnether.hero_production.unlo: Unlock a 2nd hero with a Castle, Stronghold or Fortress
alliance.reignofnether.ally_confirm: %s wants to ally with you. Accept in the Diplomacy menu or with /allyconfirm %s.
alliance.reignofnether.alliances_lock: You may not change alliances during a match (gamerule lockAlliances is on).
alliance.reignofnether.disbanded: Your alliance with %s has been disbanded.
alliance.reignofnether.disband_pending: A disband request for this player is already pending.
alliance.reignofnether.ally_control_enab: You are sharing unit control with allies.
alliance.reignofnether.ally_control_disa: You are NOT sharing unit control with allies.
alliance.reignofnether.ally_control_enab: %s is now sharing unit control with allies.
alliance.reignofnether.ally_control_disa: %s is no longer sharing unit control with allies.
survival.reignofnether.wave_cleared: Your enemies have been defeated... for now.
hud.gamemode.reignofnether.classic2: The classic RTS experience. Defeat opponents
hud.gamemode.reignofnether.classic3: by destroying all of their buildings.
hud.gamemode.reignofnether.kotb2: Fight to be the ruler of the Beacon.
hud.gamemode.reignofnether.kotb3: Upgrade and defend it to win.
hud.gamemode.reignofnether.survival3: solo or with allies. Build, fully upgrade
hud.gamemode.reignofnether.survival4: and defend a Beacon to be victorious.
hud.gamemode.reignofnether.sandbox2: Customise your map by freely placing units and,
sandbox.reignofnether.nonunit_control_ch: Control all mobs even if you don't own them
sandbox.reignofnether.publish_scenario_t: Sets this map up to be played as a scenario
Disables all other gamemode & gamerule options
No units or buildings set to any role!
You need at least one non-NPC role!
sandbox.reignofnether.scenario.team_numb: Roles with the same number are allied
sandbox.reignofnether.scenario.npc_role_: Players can't play as NPC roles
sandbox.reignofnether.scenario.help_tool: Configure the roles that players can choose to play your
scenario map as. When a scenario map starts, all units
and buildings with this role are assigned to the player.
sandbox.reignofnether.scenario.npc_role_: This role is only for NPCs!
sandbox.reignofnether.custom_buildings_i: (Click to get an RTS Structure Block)
sandbox.reignofnether.custom_buildings.d: WARNING: removes all buildings of this type!
sandbox.reignofnether.custom_buildings.s: Capturable by whoever has the most nearby troops
Area that is converted into nether terrain
Buildable during a match by villagers
Buildable during a match by zombie villagers
Buildable during a match by grunts
If neutral, grants 25%% to the player who destroys this
If neutral, grants 25%% to the player who destroys this
If neutral, grants 25%% to the player who destroys this
Maximum number of units that can garrison
Set range for garrisoned ranged units
startpos.reignofnether.start_button.tool: You have not reserved a spot!
unitstats.reignofnether.ghast_disarmed: Can't attack while out of bounds
alliances.reignofnether.tooltip.toggle_s: Toggle whether allies can control your units
